To our valued customers.

The Sampling Lounge and Museum at our St James's Street store will be closed for refurbishment from Monday 20th April until Thursday 7th May. Our store will be open as usual, and our Sampling Lounge at Harrods remains open.

 We apologise for the inconvenience caused.

    Clear All View
     

    Cuban cigars are renowned around the world as true works of art. It’s often said that each and every Cuban cigar – as well as being meticulously hand rolled – goes through more than 200 individual stages before it’s considered ready to smoke, so it’s little wonder that connoisseurs frequently consider them to be the finest cigars in the world. The cigar industry within Cuba has been under the control of the country’s government since the mid-1900s, so it’s one of the biggest sources of high quality cigars, with unprecedented variety on offer. A Cuban cigar roller is professionally known as a “Torcedor”, and many of these artisans – as well as being greatly respected within their home country – travel around the globe to showcase their skills to enthusiastic onlookers.

    The James J. Fox Cuban Cigar Collection

    The James J. Fox collection includes a vast number of quality Cuban cigars, including cigars from industry-leading brands like Cohiba, Hoyo de Monterrey, Montecristo, Partagas, Romeo Y Julieta and more. These cigars are brought to you in a wide range of sizes and strengths to suit any sort of preference. The manager of James J. Fox Cigar Merchants No.19 St. James’s Street branch – Dirk Seyfried – enrolled on his Higher Certificate Masters of Habanos course whilst on a training trip in Cuba, so our brand has a wealth of experience concerning these superb products. We’re also more than happy to pass on our expertise or our recommendations to you as well: you only have to ask.

    As the Cuban cigar industry is currently under Cuban government regulations, you are guaranteed a flawless cigar time after time, thanks to their strict product quality control guidelines. Each batch of Cuban cigars that are exported from Cuba are flawlessly made with 100% pure Cuban tobacco, in contrast to other cigar brands who incorporate various tobaccos. For this reason, those who are more experienced smokers will love Cuban cigars, thanks to their unmistakable aroma, full-bodied toke and strong taste.

    At James J. Fox, we are proud to sell genuine Cuban cigars. Each individual cigar or cigar pack is officially wrapped or boxed with details of the date of manufacture. Additionally, official stamps of the manufacturing company are clearly visible, so you’re rest assured that you’ll only be purchasing premium quality products.

    Buy Cuban Cigars from JJ Fox

    James J. Fox have been trading in luxury tobacco and accessories for the discerning smoker for over 200 years – even longer than the Cuban cigar industry has been under government control – so you can trust us to provide you with the very best cigars on the market. You can buy your cigars online directly from our website, or contact our team if you’d like to discuss your requirements in a little more detail. Alternatively, why not drop into one of our London stores in Harrods, Selfridges or on St. James Street? This latter store is one of the very few premises to be fully exempted from the smoking band, so you can either enjoy your purchase right away, or sample a Cuban cigar with a view to buying a larger quantity if it suits your smoking tastes. Count on James J. Fox today.
